title: Phase 2: Introduce DatasetMeta dataclass to reduce parameter explosion in Index.insert_dataset (15 params), Index.write_samples (11 params), and DatasetPublisher.publish* (10 params). Bundle shared metadata fields (name, schema_ref, description, tags, license, metadata) into a DatasetMeta dataclass. Accept both flat kwargs (backward compat) and meta= keyword. DatasetPublisher.publish* should also accept DatasetMeta internally. See .design/084-architectural-refactoring.md Phase 2 for full spec.
